issue.title: www.techradar.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.techradar.com/au](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.techradar.com%2Fau) ### Comment > Ad lists not being effectively implemented. > Website circumventing Adblock ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/tbdwkk49928gsc0w8wcskowkw08gkw0qv9d3crjeio.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.20 System version: | `iOS ` License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter,
EasyList

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
EasyPrivacy,
Peter Lowe's Blocklist,
Fanboy's Anti-Facebook List

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter,
Fanboy's Social Blocking List

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List,
Fanboy's Annoyances,
EasyList Cookie List

**Security:**
Phishing URL Blocklist,
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks

**Other:**
AdGuard DNS filter DNS filtering: | server: `https://d.adguard-dns.com/dns-query/xxxxxxx`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/dns/filter_1_ios.txt`

comment.body:
Websites (Owned by Future PLC) that are ignoring or circumventing ad blockers

- space.com
- techradar.com
- tomshardware.com
- gamesradar.com
- pcgamer.com
- tomsguide.com

Have found these so far that are actively featuring ads despite intensive blocks in place. 


![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/22345038-857c-47a6-907e-984a36f8ee95)

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dd67a4fc-386a-4702-a292-9e2947bdcd58)
